summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one near the opening to connect the donor-platform scene back to the map-planning setup from Chapter 8, and one at the close to make Chapter 10's sleepless morning transition read as immediate aftermath.
edits: Added a line tying the donor event to the morning's map-and-route planning from the previous chapter.
Added a closing line indicating that no one in the lab was going to sleep before daylight.
